[09:36:01.076]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:36:01.076]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:36:01.076]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:36:01.076]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:36:01.076]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:36:01.076]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:36:01.076]                   envs[common]]

[09:36:01.076]                 args <- list()
[09:36:01.076]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:36:01.076]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:36:01.076]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:36:01.076]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:36:01.076]                     next
[09:36:01.076]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:36:01.076]                 }

[09:36:01.076]                 }
[09:36:01.076]                 if (length(args) > 0)

[09:36:01.076]             }

[09:36:01.226]                   {
[09:36:01.226]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:01.226]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:01.226]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:01.226]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:01.226]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:01.226]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:01.226]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:01.226]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:01.226]                     }
[09:36:01.226]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:01.226]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:01.226]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:01.226]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:01.226]                     }
[09:36:01.226]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:01.226]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:01.226]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:01.226]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:01.226]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:01.226]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:01.226]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:01.226]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:01.226]                             next
[09:36:01.226]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:01.226]                             next
[09:36:01.226]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:01.226]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:01.226]                           break
[09:36:01.226]                         }
[09:36:01.226]                       }
[09:36:01.226]                     }
[09:36:01.226]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:36:01.226]                   }
[09:36:01.226]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:36:01.226]                 })
[09:36:01.226]             }))

[09:36:01.507]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:36:01.507]                   {
[09:36:01.507]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:01.507]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:01.507]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:01.507]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:01.507]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:01.507]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:01.507]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:01.507]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:01.507]                     }
[09:36:01.507]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:01.507]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:01.507]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:01.507]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:01.507]                     }
[09:36:01.507]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:01.507]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:01.507]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:01.507]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:01.507]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:01.507]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:01.507]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:01.507]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:01.507]                             next
[09:36:01.507]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:01.507]                             next
[09:36:01.507]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:01.507]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:01.507]                           break
[09:36:01.507]                         }
[09:36:01.507]                       }
[09:36:01.507]                     }
[09:36:01.507]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:36:01.507]                   }
[09:36:01.507]                   muffleCondition(cond)

[09:36:01.861]                   {
[09:36:01.861]                     pathname_tmp <- sprintf("%s.tmp", pathname)
[09:36:01.861]                     if (file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {

[09:36:01.861]                       stopf("Cannot save RDS file because a temporary save file already exists: %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s)",

[09:36:01.861]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]])
[09:36:01.861]                     }

[09:36:01.861]                       saveRDS(object, file = pathname_tmp, ...)
[09:36:01.861]                     }, error = function(ex) {

[09:36:01.861]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]], msg)
[09:36:01.861]                       ex$message <- msg
[09:36:01.861]                       stop(ex)
[09:36:01.861]                     })
[09:36:01.861]                     stopifnot(file_test("-f", pathname_tmp))
[09:36:01.861]                     res <- file.rename(from = pathname_tmp, to = pathname)

[09:36:01.861]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:36:01.861]                   {
[09:36:01.861]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:01.861]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:01.861]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:01.861]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:01.861]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:01.861]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:01.861]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:01.861]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:01.861]                     }
[09:36:01.861]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:01.861]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:01.861]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:01.861]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:01.861]                     }
[09:36:01.861]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:01.861]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:01.861]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:01.861]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:01.861]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:01.861]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:01.861]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:01.861]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:01.861]                             next
